MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Demurrer To Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MARGARET MIYASAKI, TEL. NO. 1-415-568-5173 PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
PAUL MCCARTHY, TEL. NO. 1-415-702-7260, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.
ATTY. AMY S. ANDERSON OF THE AROPLEX LAW, TEL. NO. 1-415-866-4066 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDNT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court modified its tentative ruling. Cross-complainant Alan Woo's motion for reconsideration of the December 29, 2016 order sustaining the demurrers to all six causes of action in his cross-complaint is denied and his alternative motion for leave to file a first amended cross-complaint is granted on the condition that he pay $200.00 to cross-defendant Margaret Miyasaki prior to the filing of the first amended cross-complaint and no later than May 12, 2017. Assuming without deciding that the motion to reconsider is timely per CCP 1008, Mr. Woo cites no new facts, law or circumstances to support the motion. Even if the court did reconsider the demurrer order, the court would reach the same conclusion since it is clear that Mr. Woo's failure to oppose the demurrer was a deliberate choice on his part. Granting the alternative motion to amend is in accord with the great liberality in allowing amendments to pleadings and the lack of any discernable legal prejudice to cross-defendants. However, CCP 473(a) provides for allowing an amendment "upon any terms as may be just." Justice here requires that Mr. Woo or his counsel pay Ms. Miyasaki for the time and expense she unnecessarily incurred in her meet and confer letter in advance of filing the demurrer, filing the demurrer, and opposing this motion. Notwithstanding counsel for Mr. Woo's statement that Mr. Woo would file reply papers, the court never received such papers. Defendant was allowed to file a First Amended Cross-Complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
